products.title: MyKit
products.description: Your personal developer toolkit. Snippets, shortcuts, and utilities — always at hand, always offline-ready.

products.title: Wash
products.description: La Lavadora de Datos — detect and mask PII & PCI data with reversible tokens. Sanitize sensitive text locally before sharing it with AI, then restore the originals.

products.title: Pilot
products.description: MergePilot — streamline your Git merge and review workflow. Navigate branches, resolve conflicts, and land changes with confidence.

products.title: Flowlyne
products.description: A fun, all-ages game playable in the browser. Jump in solo or with friends — no installs, no accounts, just play.

products.title: Pulse
products.description: A clean, offline-ready music player for the web. Queue your tracks, control playback, and enjoy your music without distractions.

products.title: Bot
products.description: ServiceNow bookmarklet builder. Unlock, copy, and install intelligent browser bots that supercharge your ServiceNow workflows.

products.title: LénaLand
products.description: An enchanted world where kids explore, discover and play. A full creative universe built around Léna's adventures.
